title: Jupiter Swap Route Finder
description: Query Jupiter's on-chain routing data indexed by GoldRush to find the best swap path for any SPL token pair — returns the expected output amount, minimum output after slippage tolerance, price impact percentage, and the full multi-hop route through intermediate DEXes (Raydium, Orca, Meteora, Lifinity, etc.). Feed this into an agent's trade execution loop: if price impact exceeds your threshold, hold the position; otherwise use the route data to construct and submit the swap transaction.
useCase: Build a swap aggregator UI or autonomous trading agent that evaluates the optimal multi-hop route for any SPL token pair and blocks trades when price impact exceeds a threshold.

keyParams.address: Wallet address to fetch Jupiter swap transaction history for
keyParams.inputMint: SPL token mint address of the token being sold
keyParams.outputMint: SPL token mint address of the token being bought
keyParams.page_size: Number of swap transactions to return per page (max 100)
keyParams.block_signed_at_asc: Sort oldest-first to reconstruct trade sequence
